prerequisites: A Customer.io account with access to a workspace where you want to send data.
Track API credentials (Site ID and API Key) for the target workspace, found under Account Settings > API Credentials.
Knowledge of your account region (US or EU), since Customer.io operates separate US and EU regions.
Optional: object storage (S3-compatible) credentials (access key ID and secret access key) if you configure object_storage_config for staging.

authMethods.name: Track API Site ID and API Key (HTTP Basic auth)
authMethods.summary: Provide the credentials.siteId and credentials.apiKey from your Customer.io workspace. Both values are combined into a Basic Authorization header so Customer.io can associate the data with your account. Generate or view these under Account Settings > API Credentials.

authMethods.name: Object storage credentials (optional)
authMethods.summary: If you supply the optional object_storage_config, provide object_storage_config.access_key_id and object_storage_config.secret_access_key to authenticate against the S3-compatible bucket used for staging. Leave object_storage_config unset if not using staged object storage.

setupSteps.title: Locate or create your Track API credentials
setupSteps.body: In Customer.io, go to Account Settings > API Credentials and select (or create) a set of Track API credentials for the workspace you want to load data into. Note the Site ID and API Key; new workspaces are given a default set of primary API credentials automatically.

setupSteps.title: Confirm your account region
setupSteps.body: Determine whether your Customer.io account is in the US or EU region. You select the region when the account is created, and all workspaces in the account share it. If you do not specify a region, the default is US; an EU account that omits the region has its requests routed from US to EU accordingly, so knowing the region ensures requests reach the correct data center.

setupSteps.title: Enter the required credentials config
setupSteps.body: Fill in the required credentials object with credentials.siteId and credentials.apiKey. These are used as the username and password of the Basic Authorization header for Track API requests.

setupSteps.title: Configure optional object storage staging
setupSteps.body: If your deployment stages records through object storage, provide the optional object_storage_config with object_storage_config.access_key_id and object_storage_config.secret_access_key. Omit object_storage_config entirely if staging is not used.
